description: A bare `null` token in value position (a declaration initializer) fires E-SYNTAX-042 (§42.7 category 2).
rationale: §42.7 normative: `null` and `undefined` SHALL NOT be valid scrml source tokens in value position, and the rejection SHALL apply uniformly across every scrml source position. Category (2) 'bare value-position literal' enumerates `Variable declaration initializers: @x = null, let x = null, const x = undefined` as a rejected shape. `not` is the single canonical absence sentinel (§42.1).
